text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, September 09. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we're talking about Ethan's academic progress. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. School projects are fun. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: That's good medical feedback. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Planning for future education costs. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Understood. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Understood. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. School projects are fun. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Staying active is key. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Calculating some savings estimates. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: I'm reviewing the scheduling portal specs for Vertex Health. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I can help with that. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Good focus area. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Busy day at Vertex Health. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
